/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o Mangrove.vst3/Contents/MacOS/Mangrove CMakeFiles/MangroveVST3.dir/MangrovePlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MangroveVST3.dir/__/__/external/vst3sdk/public.sdk/source/vst/vstsinglecomponenteffect.cpp.o  libiplug2_vst3.a ../../lib/Release/libsdk.a ../../lib/Release/libpluginterfaces.a ../DSP/libcompressor_chain.a -framework CoreFoundation -framework AudioUnit -framework AudioToolbox -framework CoreAudio ../../lib/Release/libsdk_common.a ../../lib/Release/libbase.a ../../lib/Release/libpluginterfaces.a
